domain: vending machines, kiosks, ticketing machines, coin/bill handling, and public-payment service hardware

ideas.idea_title: Modular vending machine product spiral tray
ideas.product_context: A snack vending machine uses removable trays that guide packaged products toward a dispensing bay while allowing quick restocking.
ideas.core_function: Hold products in separate lanes and advance them toward the customer pickup area.
ideas.likely_main_part: A molded tray insert with repeated channel dividers, retention lips, and mounting features.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part combines repeated cavities, thin walls, rounded product guides, and alignment details that challenge patterning and feature hierarchy.

ideas.product_context: A public payment kiosk needs a protective hood around its screen and card reader for exposure to rain and glare.
ideas.core_function: Shield user-facing controls while preserving access, visibility, and drainage.
ideas.likely_main_part: A formed front canopy with side cheeks, drip edges, and integrated fastener bosses.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The geometry requires angled surfaces, overhangs, recessed service zones, and subtle edge treatments in one coherent shell.

ideas.product_context: A transit ticketing machine routes printed tickets from an internal printer to a customer-accessible slot.
ideas.core_function: Guide flexible paper through a smooth path without jams or snag points.
ideas.likely_main_part: A curved chute with anti-snag ribs, access cutouts, and latch tabs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The design tests curved internal passages, smooth transitions, thin rib networks, and serviceable enclosure features.

ideas.product_context: A coin-operated kiosk directs inserted coins from the entry bezel into a validation module.
ideas.core_function: Collect coins from a broad entry zone and deliver them consistently to the validator throat.
ideas.likely_main_part: A tapered funnel with mounting ears, anti-bounce surfaces, and a narrow exit throat.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part mixes freeform tapering, gravity-fed flow surfaces, mounting geometry, and clearance-sensitive exit features.

ideas.product_context: A bill-handling cabinet includes a removable cash cassette for secure collection and maintenance.
ideas.core_function: Provide a durable grip and keyed interface for removing a cash cassette from the machine.
ideas.likely_main_part: A reinforced pull handle with recessed grip geometry, latch clearance, and security indexing.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The handle needs ergonomic contours, internal reinforcement, asymmetric latch reliefs, and manufacturable transitions.

ideas.idea_title: Parking pay station coin return cup
ideas.product_context: A parking pay station returns rejected coins or change to a shallow customer retrieval area.
ideas.core_function: Receive falling coins and make them easy to remove while preventing spill-out.
ideas.likely_main_part: A recessed cup insert with scooped floor, raised front lip, and drain features.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The object tests concave surfaces, user-access ergonomics, lip profiles, and small functional openings.

ideas.product_context: A payment kiosk presents a card reader module through a vandal-resistant front panel.
ideas.core_function: Frame the payment reader, guide card insertion, and protect surrounding enclosure edges.
ideas.likely_main_part: A contoured bezel with chamfered lead-in, screw covers, and anti-pry flanges.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part requires nested openings, precise front-facing contours, hidden attachment details, and durable edge geometry.

ideas.product_context: A fare machine temporarily holds a token before routing it to acceptance or return paths.
ideas.core_function: Block or release a small payment token while aligning it with downstream tracks.
ideas.likely_main_part: A pivoting gate plate with axle bosses, stop tabs, and contoured token contact faces.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The mechanism tests rotational features, contact surfaces, thin plate strength, and precise stop geometry.

ideas.product_context: A vending machine pickup bay needs a barrier that allows product retrieval but discourages reach-in theft.
ideas.core_function: Swing open for customer access while blocking direct access to the storage area.
ideas.likely_main_part: A hinged flap with curved shield face, side pivots, and weighted return detail.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The design includes a moving panel, curved blocking surfaces, hinge geometry, and clearance-aware side features.

ideas.product_context: A public kiosk with a receipt printer needs a front insert that prevents loose paper from clogging the exit area.
ideas.core_function: Guide receipts outward and keep abandoned paper away from the printer mouth.
ideas.likely_main_part: A sloped paper guard with raised side rails, tear-edge clearance, and snap mounts.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part tests shallow angled planes, thin guide rails, snap-fit details, and printer-adjacent clearances.

ideas.product_context: A bill acceptor stacks inserted banknotes into a secure cassette after validation.
ideas.core_function: Push flexible bills into a compact stack while avoiding wrinkling or misalignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: A flat paddle with compliant ribs, guide slots, and reinforced actuator connection.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: It challenges representation of thin broad surfaces, structural ribbing, sliding interfaces, and soft-contact geometry.

ideas.product_context: An information kiosk provides audio prompts through a protected front-panel speaker area.
ideas.core_function: Allow sound transmission while protecting the speaker from tampering and debris.
ideas.likely_main_part: A perforated grille insert with rear standoffs, outer frame, and drainage channels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part uses repeated openings, thin webs, enclosure mating features, and small environmental details.

ideas.product_context: A ticket vending unit lets users tear printed passes cleanly at the exit slot.
ideas.core_function: Support a serrated tear edge and align paper as it exits the printer path.
ideas.likely_main_part: A carrier rail with serration support, paper clearance slot, and fastening lands.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The representation must capture sharp functional edges, long narrow features, slot geometry, and mounting pads.

ideas.product_context: A change-making machine meters coins from a hopper into a payout chute.
ideas.core_function: Control coin release from the hopper while resisting jams and wear.
ideas.likely_main_part: A sliding gate with shaped coin pocket, guide ribs, and actuator tab.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part combines sliding constraints, shallow pockets, ribbed guidance, and wear-sensitive contact edges.

ideas.product_context: A streetside service kiosk hides its maintenance latch behind a small tamper-resistant cover.
ideas.core_function: Protect a service latch from casual access while allowing authorized opening.
ideas.likely_main_part: A flush cover plate with recessed key access, hinge knuckles, and pry-resistant perimeter.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: It tests flush surface alignment, small hinge details, recessed access geometry, and security-driven edge profiles.

ideas.product_context: A recycling machine accepts containers through a guided entry before scanning and sorting.
ideas.core_function: Center an inserted container and discourage users from reaching into the machine.
ideas.likely_main_part: A rounded entry throat with funnel ribs, shield baffles, and sensor windows.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The shape requires blended openings, internal baffles, repeated guide ribs, and transparent sensor clearance zones.

ideas.product_context: A ticketing kiosk includes a scanner window for reading mobile tickets and printed codes.
ideas.core_function: Shade the scanner, guide user placement, and protect the scan window.
ideas.likely_main_part: A recessed shroud with angled walls, window frame, and anti-glare hood.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The design challenges angled recesses, frame geometry, line-of-sight constraints, and user-facing surface transitions.

ideas.product_context: A coin handling module routes coins by size and path after initial validation.
ideas.core_function: Guide rolling coins along a controlled track toward sorting features.
ideas.likely_main_part: A rail segment with curved track bed, retaining wall, and adjustable stop interface.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part tests narrow curved channels, rolling contact surfaces, retention geometry, and modular alignment features.

ideas.product_context: A payment terminal guides banknotes from the exterior bezel into internal feed rollers.
ideas.core_function: Lead bills into the transport path while rejecting folded corners and misfeeds.
ideas.likely_main_part: A tapered entry mouth with rounded lips, central guide ribs, and sensor clearance.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: It needs smooth funnel geometry, thin alignment ribs, integrated openings, and careful front-to-back transitions.

ideas.idea_title: Laundry payment kiosk coin vault liner
ideas.product_context: A shared laundry payment station stores collected coins in a removable secure vault.
ideas.core_function: Protect the vault interior from abrasion and guide coins away from the access door.
ideas.likely_main_part: A drop-in liner with sloped floor, impact ribs, and keyed locating tabs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The model combines sloping internal planes, abrasion ribs, keyed placement features, and enclosure-fit tolerances.

ideas.idea_title: Vending machine cup drop carousel plate
ideas.product_context: A beverage vending machine separates stacked cups before drink dispensing.
ideas.core_function: Index cup stacks and release a single cup into the filling area.
ideas.likely_main_part: A rotating plate with scalloped pockets, center hub, and retaining edge details.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part challenges radial repetition, curved pocket cutouts, hub geometry, and moving-system clearances.

ideas.product_context: A service technician slides a cash drawer out of a payment kiosk during collection.
ideas.core_function: Support guided drawer motion while resisting twist and unauthorized removal.
ideas.likely_main_part: A structural rail with stop features, screw bosses, and captured sliding surfaces.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The object tests long structural geometry, repeated mounting features, stop details, and sliding interface representation.

ideas.product_context: A public ticket machine uses illuminated push buttons for fare selection or confirmation.
ideas.core_function: Frame a button, carry light around its edge, and seal the panel opening.
ideas.likely_main_part: A translucent collar with stepped flange, light-channel geometry, and sealing lip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part tests concentric profiles, material-specific light paths, sealing details, and small front-panel features.

ideas.product_context: A card payment kiosk reduces shoulder-surfing around PIN entry and screen prompts.
ideas.core_function: Block side views of sensitive input areas without interfering with user access.
ideas.likely_main_part: A side wing panel with curved leading edge, mounting flange, and stiffening ribs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The shape combines thin protective panels, curved ergonomic edges, bracket-like mounting, and ribbed reinforcement.

ideas.product_context: A coin-operated public machine reduces noise when returned coins drop into a metal cup.
ideas.core_function: Absorb coin impact and keep returned coins visible and retrievable.
ideas.likely_main_part: A removable soft insert with textured floor, perimeter lip, and drain reliefs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part tests flexible-material cues, shallow texture, nested fit geometry, and functional surface relief.

ideas.product_context: A small public payment kiosk provides a bag hook near the payment area for customer convenience.
ideas.core_function: Hold a hanging load while staying compact and vandal resistant.
ideas.likely_main_part: A hooked bracket with thickened root, concealed fastener pocket, and rounded nose.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The geometry asks for load-bearing curvature, hidden fastening, variable thickness, and smooth public-touch surfaces.

ideas.product_context: A standalone parking payment meter uses a small solar panel on its upper housing.
ideas.core_function: Hold the panel at a protected angle while sealing it into the meter enclosure.
ideas.likely_main_part: An angled frame with gasket channel, corner bosses, and cable pass-through.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part blends inclined frame geometry, seal grooves, wiring openings, and enclosure attachment features.

ideas.idea_title: Transit card reload kiosk tap pad
ideas.product_context: A fare reload kiosk gives users a marked contactless area for tapping stored-value cards.
ideas.core_function: Create a durable target surface over the contactless reader while guiding card placement.
ideas.likely_main_part: A shallow pad insert with raised alignment border, icon recess, and rear mounting clips.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The design tests low-relief surface features, tactile borders, clipped mounting, and visual-symbol accommodation without code.

ideas.product_context: A cash-handling service terminal routes accepted bills either to storage or to a recycle cassette.
ideas.core_function: Redirect bills between transport paths with minimal friction and clear actuation.
ideas.likely_main_part: A thin diverter flap with curved leading edge, pivot bosses, and actuator lug.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The mechanism stresses thin moving surfaces, tangent flow paths, pivot features, and asymmetric actuator geometry.

ideas.idea_title: Vending machine service door hinge reinforcement
ideas.product_context: A large vending enclosure needs reinforced internal hinge support for repeated maintenance access.
ideas.core_function: Distribute hinge loads across the cabinet door while preserving internal clearance.
ideas.likely_main_part: A reinforcement plate with hinge boss pads, formed ribs, and cable relief notches.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: The part combines flat structural stock, raised pads, formed stiffeners, and irregular clearance cutouts.
